basic.heroSubtitle: Send photos to your loved ones' frames instantly. They'll see your face every day, feeling your presence even when you're apart.
basic.designedFeatureDescription: Every feature crafted to bridge the distance between generations.
basic.designedFeature1Description: Send "I am thinking of you" in one tap. Your family sees it on their frame instantly.
basic.designedFeature2Description: Relive special moments. Photos from the same day in previous years appear as delightful surprises.
basic.designedFeature3Description: Birthdays and holidays automatically remembered. Family stays connected.
basic.designedFeature4Description: Elderly family members can receive photos by simply scanning a QR code.
basic.designedFeature5Description: E-ink display only uses power when changing. Set it and forget it.
basic.designedFeature6Description: Your photos stay private. Self-hosted AI, no cloud dependency.
basic.featureTitle: For the moments that deserve to stay visible
basic.featureDescription: MyFrame is for parents, couples, and families who want photos to become part of daily life, not disappear into a phone gallery.
basic.productDescription: The latest E-ink technology delivers 65,000 colors with a paper-like finish. No glare, no backlight — just natural, beautiful images that look like prints.
basic.pricingDescription: One price. No subscriptions. No hidden fees.
basic.familyDescription: Share moments through a mobile app experience that feels natural for families and comforting for the people who matter most.
basic.familyStep1Description: That's it. The frame connects to Wi‑Fi automatically.
basic.familyStep2Description: Send a QR code or invite link via WeChat, SMS, or email.
basic.familyStep3Description: Photos appear on the frame within seconds.
basic.specsDescription: From compact to large format, find the perfect MyFrame for your space.
basic.specsAsideBody: MyFrame is designed first as a home object: low power, low glare, and quiet enough to live with for years.
basic.specsNote1Body: Easy on the eyes with a natural, print-like look.
basic.specsNote2Body: Moments arrive without asking family to learn a complicated new experience.
basic.specsNote3Body: Compact options for desks and a larger format for shared spaces.

footer.footerText: A device where family can "appear" anytime. Built with love for the ones who matter most.

features.title: For parents far away
features.description: Send a photo from your day and let it become a quiet moment at home, where your parents can enjoy it without opening another app.

features.title: For daily family life
features.description: Keep small moments visible: a child's smile, an ordinary afternoon, a weekend walk, or a simple hello from across town.

features.title: For weddings and gifts
features.description: A meaningful gift can keep growing after the special day, becoming a living album for the home.

features.title: After birthday
features.description: Keep birthday moments visible after the celebration, with little memories that stay warm long after the candles are out.

features.title: An art show in the room
features.description: Use the display as a calm gallery corner for favorite artwork, travel photos, and the images that set the mood of a room.

features.title: For animals and pets

blogs.title: Why families are moving photo sharing back into the home
blogs.excerpt: Phones hold thousands of images, but the moments that matter rarely stay visible. MyFrame is built to make meaningful family photos part of daily life at home.
blogs.body:
We take more family photos than any generation before us. The hard part is not capture-it is keeping the right images present in the rhythm of home life.

From camera roll to living room

MyFrame pairs a paper-like e-paper display with a mobile workflow designed for busy families. Children, parents, and grandparents do not need another complicated feed; they need a quiet surface that shows the people they love.

Designed for distance and togetherness

Whether relatives live across the city or across time zones, new moments can land on the frame without asking everyone to open the same app every day. The product story is simple: one connected display, private family albums, and instant delivery when you send a photo.

No subscription story for everyday use

MyFrame is positioned as a one-time hardware purchase for normal family use-no required monthly plan to keep memories on the wall. That makes it a strong gift for parents and grandparents who should not be asked to manage another subscription.

Bottom line: MyFrame exists so the photos you already treasure become part of the home again-not buried three scrolls deep in a gallery.
blogs.meta_title: Why families move photo sharing home | MyFrame
blogs.meta_description: How MyFrame connected frames help families keep meaningful photos visible at home with calm e-paper displays and private sharing.

blogs.title: Inside MyFrame: Spectra 6 e-paper and a calmer photo experience
blogs.excerpt: A closer look at the Spectra 6 colour e-paper pipeline in MyFrame products: gentle colour, low refresh power, and a display that feels closer to print than to a tablet.
blogs.body:
Consumer displays are bright, punchy, and attention-seeking. MyFrame takes a different path: a large-format e-paper canvas that behaves more like a framed print that updates when your family sends something new.

Why e-paper fits the product

Spectra 6 technology brings a wide colour range with a matte, paper-like surface. There is no backlight competing with room lighting, which makes long viewing easier in living rooms, hallways, and bedside tables.

Power that matches the use case

Unlike LCD panels that draw power continuously, e-paper uses energy when the image changes. For a family frame that updates when new photos arrive-rather than playing video 24/7-that profile supports long battery life on portable models and a calm "always there" feel on larger wall units.

Product lineup context

MyFrame ships multiple sizes-from compact desk-friendly frames to a 13.3" family-room format. Each shares the same story: private sharing tools, SD support where models allow, and connectivity options aligned with how families already use Wi-Fi and mobile apps.

Takeaway: MyFrame is not trying to be another smart TV. It is a dedicated memory surface-hardware and software built together so family photography feels natural in the home.
blogs.meta_description: Technical and product notes on MyFrame's Spectra 6 e-paper displays, colour behaviour, and why the experience is tuned for long viewing at home.

faqs.question: How do I pair a frame?
faqs.answer: Open Home, tap Pair/Device Info, then scan the QR code on your frame.

faqs.question: What if upload fails?
faqs.answer: Check Wi‑Fi/Bluetooth and try again. In offline mode, use SD export.
